doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: fabricated
reason: The real ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses multijurisdictional practice by lawyers and contains none of the subsections presented here regarding paralegal activities, definitions of "practice of law," or an "emergency exception" disclaimer.
response_turn1:

LABEL: FABRICATED
